---
title: "API Deployment and Testing: NHANES Prediabetes Model"
author: "Zhalae Daneshvari, Jolene Ie, Nick Johnson"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# API Deployment

# Importating Data
```{python}
import pandas as pd

# path to cleaned dataset
CSV_PATH = "data-raw/nhanes2123_surveyonly_clean.csv"
df = pd.read_csv(CSV_PATH)

target_col = "prediabetes_flag"
X = df.drop(columns=[target_col])
y = df[target_col]

print("Data loaded:", X.shape)
print("Columns:", list(X.columns))

```


# Training the model 
```{python}
from sklearn.pipeline import Pipeline
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler, OneHotEncoder, FunctionTransformer
from sklearn.compose import ColumnTransformer
from sklearn.impute import SimpleImputer
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegressionCV
from sklearn.model_selection import StratifiedKFold, train_test_split
from sklearn.metrics import roc_auc_score, accuracy_score, classification_report

# fix the column lists based on df
numeric_cols = [
    "age_years", "sleep_hours_weekdays", "sedentary_minutes",
    "drinks_per_day_12mo", "bmi_from_selfreport", "weight_change_1y_lb"
]

categorical_cols = [
    'sex', 'race_eth', 'smoked_100_cigs_ans', 'smoke_now_ans',
    'tried_lose_weight_past_year_ans', 'regular_periods_12mo_ans',
    'dpq_poor_appetite_ans', 'dpq_feeling_down_ans', 'ever_asthma_ans',
    'anemia_treatment_3mo_ans', 'ever_chf_ans', 'ever_heart_attack_ans',
    'ever_stroke_ans', 'ever_thyroid_problem_ans', 'ever_liver_condition_ans',
    'ever_high_bp_ans', 'ever_high_chol_ans', 'ever_smoker', 'current_smoker'
]

# define preprocessing 
def to_str_func(X):
    return X.astype(str)

num_pipe = Pipeline([
    ("imp", SimpleImputer(strategy="median", add_indicator=True)),
    ("sc", StandardScaler())
])
cat_pipe = Pipeline([
    ("imp", SimpleImputer(strategy="constant", fill_value="Unknown")),
    ("to_str", FunctionTransformer(to_str_func, validate=False)),
    ("ohe", OneHotEncoder(handle_unknown="ignore", sparse_output=False, min_frequency=0.02))
])

preprocess = ColumnTransformer([
    ("num", num_pipe, numeric_cols),
    ("cat", cat_pipe, categorical_cols)
])

# model 
cv = StratifiedKFold(n_splits=5, shuffle=True, random_state=42)
model = Pipeline([
    ("prep", preprocess),
    ("clf", LogisticRegressionCV(
        Cs=[0.1, 1, 10],
        cv=cv,
        penalty="l2",
        solver="lbfgs",
        max_iter=3000,
        scoring="roc_auc",
        random_state=42
    ))
])

# split and train
X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(
    X, y, test_size=0.2, stratify=y, random_state=42
)

model.fit(X_train, y_train)
print("Model trained successfully")

proto = X.head(2).copy()

# fill NaN properly for all columns before pinning
for col in proto.columns:
    if proto[col].dtype in ["float64", "int64"]:
        proto[col] = proto[col].fillna(0)
    else:
        proto[col] = proto[col].fillna("Unknown").astype(str)

print("Prototype schema prepared:")
print(proto.dtypes)

```


# Make Docker File
```{python}
import os, gcsfs, pins

SA_KEY = "/home/ji92/proj-01-dank-corgi/service-auth.json"
os.environ["GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS"] = SA_KEY
gcsfs.GCSFileSystem.clear_instance_cache()

board = pins.board_gcs("info-4940-models/ji92/", allow_pickle_read=True)

v = VetiverModel(
    model=model,
    model_name="prediabetes-model-3", 
    prototype_data=proto,
    description="Logistic regression model predicting prediabetes from NHANES survey data.",
)

vetiver_pin_write(board, v)

import vetiver
from vetiver import VetiverModel, vetiver_pin_write

vetiver.write_docker(
    app_file = "app.py",
    port = '2222'
)

vetiver.prepare_docker(
    board = board, 
    pin_name = "prediabetes-model-1",
    port = '2222'
)
```


# Testing
```{python}
import pandas as pd
import requests
import json

API_URL = "http://appliedml.infosci.cornell.edu:2222/predict"

# load and clean data
df = pd.read_csv("data-raw/nhanes2123_surveyonly_clean.csv")

if "prediabetes_flag" in df.columns:
    df = df.drop(columns=["prediabetes_flag"])

# clean schema to match prototype
for col in df.columns:
    if df[col].dtype in ["float64", "int64"]:
        df[col] = df[col].fillna(0)
    else:
        df[col] = df[col].fillna("Unknown").astype(str)

# pick random rows 
sample_rows = df.sample(5, random_state=42).to_dict(orient="records")

print(f"Sending {len(sample_rows)} rows to API...\n")

# POST to API 
response = requests.post(
    API_URL,
    headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
    data=json.dumps(sample_rows)
)

# handle response
if response.status_code == 200:
    preds = response.json()
    print("Success. Raw API response:\n", preds, "\n")

    # detect response type automatically 
    if isinstance(preds, list) and all(isinstance(p, dict) for p in preds):
        # standard vetiver JSON format (list of dicts)
        for i, (inp, outp) in enumerate(zip(sample_rows, preds)):
            print(f"Row {i+1}:")
            print(f"  Input: age={inp['age_years']}, sex={inp['sex']}, BMI={inp['bmi_from_selfreport']}")
            print(f"  Predicted: {outp.get('predicted')} | Probability: {outp.get('pred_proba', 0):.3f}\n")

    elif isinstance(preds, list):
        # simple list of predictions
        for i, (inp, pred) in enumerate(zip(sample_rows, preds)):
            print(f"Row {i+1}:")
            print(f"  Input: age={inp['age_years']}, sex={inp['sex']}, BMI={inp['bmi_from_selfreport']}")
            print(f"  Predicted: {pred}\n")

    else:
        print("Unexpected format:", type(preds))

else:
    print(f"API Error {response.status_code}")
    print(response.text)
```
